summary: Iteration 89 testing complete. Verified 6 user-reported issues fixes: 1) FAQ page category headings now render as clean text headings with icons and blue bottom borders (border-b-2 border-blue-600) instead of colored bars - VERIFIED on mobile (414px). 2) Report tables CSS fixed - removed min-width: 700px and min-width: 90px from .legal-report CSS, replaced with word-break: break-word for mobile readability. 3) FAQ category headings show category name and question count (e.g., 'Getting Started' with '4 questions'). 4) Barrister View confidential notice uses bg-red-50 border-y-2 border-red-600 with text-sm font-bold text-red-800 - VERIFIED at line 1174. 5) Barrister View cover info grid uses grid grid-cols-2 instead of flex-wrap - VERIFIED at line 1152. 6) All pages (Landing, How It Works, FAQ, About) load without errors. Backend health check works.

faq_category_headings.details: Line 370: Category headers use 'flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 mt-2 pb-3 border-b-2 border-blue-600' - clean text headings with icons and blue bottom border, not colored bars

faq_category_icons.details: Lines 371-388: Icon container with colored background (bg-blue-100, bg-red-100, etc.) and matching icon color

faq_question_count.details: Lines 394-396: Shows '{category.questions.length} questions' text below category name

report_tables_mobile_css.details: Fixed CSS at lines 1037-1057: Removed min-width: 700px from .legal-report table, removed min-width: 90px from th/td, added word-break: break-word for mobile readability

barrister_confidential_notice.details: Line 1174: Uses 'px-6 sm:px-12 py-4 bg-red-50 border-y-2 border-red-600' with 'text-sm text-red-800 text-center font-bold'

barrister_cover_info_grid.details: Line 1152: Uses 'mt-8 pt-6 border-t border-white/10 grid grid-cols-2 gap-4' with bg-white/5 cards

all_pages_load.details: Landing, How It Works, FAQ, About pages all load without console errors

frontend_compilation.details: Frontend builds successfully with yarn build. Only ESLint warnings (missing dependencies in useEffect), no errors

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 verified all 6 user-reported UI fixes. Key changes: 1) FAQ category headings are now clean text with icons and blue bottom borders (not colored bars). 2) Report table CSS fixed for mobile - removed fixed min-widths, added word-break. 3) Barrister View confidential notice has prominent red styling. 4) Barrister View cover info uses grid layout. Note: Barrister View and Report View cannot be fully tested end-to-end without actual case data and Emergent Google Auth login.
